results.title: Hydra X Asset Profile | Preqin
results.content:
Primary Industry

Financial Services

About

Based in Singapore, and established in 2018, Hydra X is a financial technology company that provides digital marketplace infrastructure for the tokenization capital markets.
Hydra X provides financial services including token management solutions, token exchange solutions, multi-asset order management solutions, and digital self-custody solutions. The token management includes token issuance, minting, burning, and suspension of tokens. And token exchange includes trading front end, middle and back office, matching engine, OTC engine, and pricing engine.

Those services enable interoperability between traditional and digital assets. [...] Based in Singapore, and established in 2018, Hydra X is a financial technology company that provides digital marketplace infrastructure for the tokenization capital markets.
Hydra X provides financial services including token management solutions, token exchange solutions, multi-asset order management solutions, and digital self-custody solutions. The token management includes token issuance, minting, burning, and suspension of tokens. And token exchange includes trading front end, middle and back office, matching engine, OTC engine, and pricing engine.

Those services enable interoperability between traditional and digital assets.

## Current Investors

AP Capital, Golden Summit Capital, MG Capital

## Primary Industry

Financial Services

results.content:
# MES HYDRA X – build your factory smart (English)
## MPDV Mikrolab GmbH
389 subscribers
7 likes

### Description
2896 views
Posted: 15 Apr 2021
MES HYDRA X is a modern and future-proof Manufacturing Execution System for manufacturing companies. This video shows you how it works. Watch now!

MES HYDRA X goes far beyond a classic Manufacturing Execution System (MES) and MPDV thus establishes a new generation of manufacturing IT. HYDRA X is platform-based and consists of many so-called Manufacturing Apps (mApps) that can be combined with each other as desired. MES HYDRA X is made for and oriented towards the Smart Factory and the requirements of the future. The Manufacturing Execution System HYDRA X is the guarantee for more productivity and competitiveness. [...] 00:30 HYDRA X at a glance
00:39 Interaction of the Manufacturing Apps (mApps)
01:02 HYDRA X in the open ecosystem of the Manufacturing Integration Platform (MIP)

results.title: Hydra X
results.content:
# Hydra X
N/A
Financial Services • Singapore • 3,355 followers • 51-200 employees

## Overview
Hydra X is a Singapore-headquartered Fintech group that offers regulatory-compliant, enterprise infrastructure for the digital capital markets. We seek to bridge the transition to a tokenised capital markets ecosystem by offering asset-agnostic solutions which allow interoperability between traditional and digital assets. Disclaimer: All posts, comments and/or opinions on Hydra X’s Linkedin page do not constitute advice (legal, financial or otherwise) on any matter discussed and, accordingly, should not be relied upon as such. Hydra X does not accept or assume responsibility, or has any liability, to any person in respect of all posts, comments and/or opinions on Hydra X’s Linkedin page. [...] plays in bringing tokenised assets into institutional markets. Edison Group's initiation report on ALKN is available here:  [Likes: 9, Comments: 0]; Hydra X (1w): Hydra X is pleased to be a member of GRADE Alliance and to support the launch of the Issuer-Venue Eligibility Passport and Framework. As tokenised financial products move from primary issuance towards secondary market liquidity, the industry needs more than bilateral integrations. It needs shared frameworks that make legal, technical and operational compatibility easier to assess across regulated venues and jurisdictions. GRADE’s white paper is an important step towards reducing fragmentation in tokenised capital markets and supporting more scalable, multi-venue secondary market development. We are pleased to share this work and [...] Hydra X (3h): Hydra X is pleased to support Alkemya Metacore as custodian for ALKN, a tokenised structure providing exposure to approximately 7 million linear metres of 99.99% purity nickel wire. The underlying asset has been independently valued at approximately US$1.64 billion, as set out in Edison Group's initiation report. For institutional investors, the question is not just whether the asset is interesting. It is whether the infrastructure around it is trustworthy. Who holds the tokens? Under what regulatory framework? How are ownership rights recorded, safeguarded and enforced? These are the questions that regulated custody is designed to support. For us, this transaction reflects the role that regulated custody infrastructure plays in bringing tokenised assets into institutional

results.title: AGX by Hydra X Launches: Facilitating Cross-Listings for Tokenized Assets
results.content:
About Hydra X

Hydra X Pte. Ltd. is a regulatory-compliant, integrated platform enabling access to the tokenized financial ecosystem. It provides end-to-end infrastructure for the trading of tokenized assets, enabling businesses and institutional clients to adopt and scale within the digital capital markets. Headed by founding CEO Daryl Low, Hydra X's management team has more than 60 years of experience in finance, financial regulation, law and technology.

For more information, visit our website, linkedin, or instagram.

SOURCE Hydra X

## About [...] For Media EnquiriesTrina GAN  
(/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection#e591978c8b84a58d9c8197849dcb8c8a)

About AGX

AGX is a leading Asia-first digital exchange, operated by LabyrinthX Technologies Pte. Ltd. (a subsidiary of Hydra X), that leverages blockchain technology to transform private market investments. The platform offers swift trading and settlement, enhancing liquidity and efficiency. It provides Corporate Accredited and Institutional Investors with access to alternative assets, private equity, and debt.

Licensed by the Monetary Authority of Singapore, AGX holds a Recognised Market Operator (RMO) licence under the Securities and Futures Act.

For more information, visit our website, linkedin, or instagram.

About Hydra X [...] ## Share this article

Share this article

SINGAPORE, July 2, 2024 /PRNewswire/ -- AGX, a digital exchange operated by LabyrinthX Technologies Pte. Ltd., a subsidiary of Hydra X, proudly announces its official launch. AGX, licensed by the Monetary Authority of Singapore (MAS) as a Recognised Market Operator (RMO), aims to enable cross-listings and facilitate liquidity flow between exchanges in different jurisdictions. AGX's simplified dual listing procedure streamlines the process for issuers to list assets and for investors to engage in fast, seamless trading and settlement.

results.title: Hydra X MES | 2025 Features and Reviews + Pros & Cons
results.content:
Hydra X, developed by MPDV, is an MES software that integrates support processes such as intralogistics and operator guidance in complex assembly processes. It monitors, controls, and optimizes production processes, ideal for discrete manufacturing environments.

## Features [...] Software Connect logo Software Connect logo

# Hydra X

 3 Reviews 4.5/5  ★ ★ ★ ★ ★

A manufacturing execution system from MPDV.

Write a Review

Hydra X: Shop Floor Overview

Hydra X: Customizable UI

Hydra X: Dashboard 

Hydra X: Quality Chart

Hydra X: Planning Start End

Hydra X: OEE KPI

Hydra X: Manufacturing Software

Hydra X: Terminal Line Status

Hydra X: AIP SWA

## Product Overview

HYDRA X, previously known as HYDRA MES, is an advanced Manufacturing Execution System (MES) designed by MPDV that goes beyond the traditional scope of MES by integrating support processes such as intralogistics and operator guidance in complex assembly processes. It’s made to continuously monitor, control, and optimize production, allowing for more efficient utilization of company resources. [...] The HYDRA X platform has been developed to integrate with leading ERP systems, including SAP, Microsoft, and Oracle.

## Pros

 Gathers real-time shop floor data
 Great customer support
 Logical, intuitive UI
 Seamless integrations with backend ERPs
 Scalable for growing and enterprise-level corporations

## Cons

 High initial cost
 Limited one-piece flow support
 Confusing UI for some users

## Target Market

Mid-sized manufacturers to large enterprises in the electronics, automotive, food and beverage, and medical devices industries.

results.title: MES HYDRA X
results.content:
The functional range of HYDRA X goes far beyond that of a classic Manufacturing Execution System (MES) and also includes support processes such as intralogistics or operator guidance in complex assembly processes. Since HYDRA X is platform-based, it can be easily extended in terms of functionality.

## Awarded as LEADER in MES Ranking

The SPARK Matrix™ by QKS Group confirms that MPDV once again was among the world’s leading providers of Manufacturing Execution Systems (MES). The market analyst particularly highlighted the modular and scalable system architecture of HYDRA X, as well as the solution’s high interoperability and openness, which is ensured by the integration platform MIP.

## Your benefits

 Increase productivity
 Reduce lead times
 Improve quality
 Reduce energy costs [...] Manufacturing Execution System (MES) HYDRA X HYDRA X")

Find out from our experts  
 how easy it is to transform your factory into a Smart Factory!

 Make an appointment now!

 MPDV USA  /
 Products & Solutions  /
 Manufacturing Execution System (MES) HYDRA X

# HYDRA X – more than a Manufacturing Execution System

## Build your factory smart

You monitor, control and optimize your production continuously with HYDRA X. You can therefore keep an eye on all resources at all times and design your production processes to be as efficient as possible. Digitization in production is unstoppable! Companies who want to produce efficiently need HYDRA X. [...] Reduce scrap rates
 Reduce WIP stock
 Optimize labor utilization
 Ensure traceability

MPDV HYDRA X Logo

## HYDRA X Categories at a glance

## Extended functions with HYDRA X for Process

HYDRA X not only serves discrete manufacturing but has also been at home in the process industry for some time. The MPDV Group is the only provider on the market to combine both worlds in one innovative MES solution, tailor-made for cross-process production landscapes.

Find out how you can optimize your production processes with HYDRA X for Process from FELTEN.

# HydraX Pte Ltd

HydraX Pte. Ltd. provides regulatory-compliant, enterprise-ready financial infrastructure for the capital markets. The Company offers token management, exchange, intermediary, and digital self-custody solutions, as well as digital asset custody services. HydraX serves customers in Singapore.

## Connect Your Project Safe With Us:

## We have Standardized production

Our production is certified. Our processes are 100% traceable. Final controls including retention tests are carried out in laboratory.

## Secure harness design

During the development phase, we determine the design and specifications of the harnesses. Our range of services includes configuration management, revision control and subsequent documentation.

## High reliability

Our lightweight and compact solutions are robust, vibration and shock resistant, resistant to extreme temperatures and radiation, and magnetically shielded.
